title: aegilops ligustica
intro: Aegilops ligustica, also known as Italian goat grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the wheat and barley family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat digestive problems. Aegilops ligustica is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or inflorescence, and its extracts are used in various pharmaceutical products.
